source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit containing the measured HBM service estimator and generator hook.

requested_items.objective: Recompute the measured-SRAM Llama7B attention frontier with explicit HBM controller service parameters.

expected_result.reason: The result should report best latency, effective HBM bytes/cycle, source-vs-derived HBM efficiency, controller service cycles, and dominant resource.
